From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

1969 studio album by Joe Jones

| Boogaloo Joe | |
| --- | --- |
|  | |
| [Studio album](/wiki/Album "Album") by [Joe Jones](/wiki/Ivan_%22Boogaloo_Joe%22_Jones "Ivan \"Boogaloo Joe\" Jones") | |
| Released | 1969 |
| Recorded | August 4, 1969 |
| Studio | [Van Gelder Studio](/wiki/Van_Gelder_Studio "Van Gelder Studio"), Englewood Cliffs, New Jersey |
| [Genre](/wiki/Music_genre "Music genre") | [Jazz](/wiki/Jazz "Jazz") |
| Length | 36:55 |
| [Label](/wiki/Record_label "Record label") | [Prestige](/wiki/Prestige_Records "Prestige Records") PR 7697 |
| [Producer](/wiki/Record_producer "Record producer") | [Bob Porter](/wiki/Bob_Porter_(record_producer) "Bob Porter (record producer)") |
| [Joe Jones](/wiki/Ivan_%22Boogaloo_Joe%22_Jones "Ivan \"Boogaloo Joe\" Jones") chronology | |
| |  |  |  | | --- | --- | --- | | *[My Fire!](/wiki/My_Fire! "My Fire!")* (1968) | ***Boogaloo Joe*** (1969) | *[Right On Brother](/wiki/Right_On_Brother "Right On Brother")* (1970) | | |

***Boogaloo Joe*** is the third album by guitarist [Joe Jones](/wiki/Ivan_%22Boogaloo_Joe%22_Jones "Ivan \"Boogaloo Joe\" Jones") which was recorded in 1969 and released on the [Prestige](/wiki/Prestige_Records "Prestige Records") label.[[1]](#cite_note-1)[[2]](#cite_note-2)

## Reception

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Boogaloo_Joe&action=edit&section=1 "Edit section: Reception")]

Professional ratings

| Review scores | |
| --- | --- |
| Source | Rating |
| [Allmusic](/wiki/Allmusic "Allmusic") | StarStarStar[[3]](#cite_note-Allmusic-3) |

[Allmusic](/wiki/Allmusic "Allmusic") awarded the album 3 stars stating "It offers more dependable grooves in the same mold, though, mixing originals and covers".[[3]](#cite_note-Allmusic-3)

## Track listing

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Boogaloo_Joe&action=edit&section=2 "Edit section: Track listing")]

All compositions by Joe Jones except where noted.

1. "Boogaloo Joe" – 6:35
2. "Don't Deceive Me (Please Don't Go)" ([Chuck Willis](/wiki/Chuck_Willis "Chuck Willis")) – 8:05 [note: on original LP release, this song was titled "People Are Talking"]
3. "Boardwalk Blues" – 4:18
4. "Dream On Little Dreamer" (Fred Burch, [Jan Crutchfield](/wiki/Jan_Crutchfield "Jan Crutchfield")) – 6:40
5. "Atlantic City Soul" – 4:55
6. "6:30 Blues" – 6:22

## Personnel

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Boogaloo_Joe&action=edit&section=3 "Edit section: Personnel")]

* [Joe Jones](/wiki/Ivan_%22Boogaloo_Joe%22_Jones "Ivan \"Boogaloo Joe\" Jones") – [guitar](/wiki/Guitar "Guitar")
* [Rusty Bryant](/wiki/Rusty_Bryant "Rusty Bryant") – [tenor saxophone](/wiki/Tenor_saxophone "Tenor saxophone")
* [Sonny Phillips](/wiki/Sonny_Phillips "Sonny Phillips") – [organ](/wiki/Electronic_organ "Electronic organ"), [electric piano](/wiki/Electric_piano "Electric piano")
* Eddie Mathias – [electric bass](/wiki/Electric_bass "Electric bass")
* [Bernard Purdie](/wiki/Bernard_Purdie "Bernard Purdie") – [drums](/wiki/Drum_kit "Drum kit")
